input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.10.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.10.2
            TITLE: the vehicle must pull into the driver change area at the first opportunity

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.10.2: The vehicle must pull into the Driver Change Area at the first opportunity
D.12.10.2 The vehicle must pull into the Driver Change Area at the first opportunity

final_answer: The vehicle must pull into the Driver Change Area at the first opportunity
